description: [sed] - Stream editor for filtering and transforming text. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Replace all occurrences of 'old' with 'new' in standard output
commands.explanation: Executes the sed routine logically to process: replace all occurrences of 'old' with 'new' in standard output
Executes the sed routine logically to process: edit the file exactly in-place (dangerous)

commands.description: Delete lines matching the specified pattern
commands.explanation: Executes the sed routine logically to process: delete lines matching the specified pattern
Executes the sed routine logically to process: print only lines 5 through 10
